title: Croatian Andouille and Pilaf Skillet
description: A hearty skillet dish combining the flavors of Croatia with spicy Andouille sausage.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Andouille sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the sausage from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the cooked pilaf, tomato paste, and chicken broth to the skillet.
Stir to combine and bring to a simmer.
If using white wine, add it to the skillet and cook until the liquid has reduced by half, about 2-3 minutes.
Return the Andouille sausage to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the sausage is fully coated in the pilaf mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
